requirements: Target metadata and any claimed original are durable before source finalization.
A rejected or forged acknowledgement leaves the source intact.

evidence.contains: available source stays intact until a retry proves target original custody
forged accepted acknowledgement cannot bypass the original custody guard
keeps an available source intact until a retry proves target byte custody
rejects a forged accepted acknowledgement that does not prove original custody

requirements: One or many reviewed records use durable exact counts and replay-safe acknowledgements.
Metadata-only records never claim or delete an original.

evidence.contains: metadata-only Move resumes across every durable boundary
review counts remain exact across replay and restart
resumes metadata-only Move across every durable boundary
derives exact review counts from durable items

requirements: Metadata-only, duplicate, conflict, unsupported, and skipped categories remain explicit.
Unknown product metadata and albums survive a round trip without fabricated provenance.

evidence.contains: deterministically distinguish duplicate, conflict, unsupported, and skipped records
native album membership follows canonical positions
persists and exports canonical albums with exact round-trip metadata
leaves divergent identities for the same remote origin unpersisted as conflicts

requirements: Reviewed scope, direction, checkpoints, replay, pause, resume, and disconnect are durable.
Conflicts converge independently of delivery order and deletes never apply silently.

evidence.contains: delete review, pause, cancel, and disconnect never silently mutate a library
Sync convergence uses product roles, not delivery order
requires tombstone review and disconnects without deleting either library
converges to the same field winners independent of delivery order

requirements: Every durable Move boundary resumes after restart without loss or duplicate finalization.
Transport retries reuse only verified chunks and reject changed replay content.

evidence.contains: metadata-only Move resumes across every durable boundary
resumes verified chunks, paginates, and reproduces exact ciphertext
resumes metadata-only Move across every durable boundary
resumes verified chunks and fails closed on corruption

requirements: pCloud, Google Drive, and iCloud expose success, offline, auth, quota, unavailable, partial, and corrupt states honestly.
Recovery actions route by error type and do not invent provider success.

evidence.contains: continues a partial resumable upload from the provider-acknowledged byte
resumable errors use the resume handler
fault injection produces each engine error path
uses the shared acknowledgement and recovery vocabulary

requirements: Interop roots cannot enumerate or overwrite either product backup namespace.
Pairing and transfer identities scope every provider object.

evidence.contains: writes and verifies only below the interop root with separate custody
isolated listings
pCloud writes below Overlook Interop and never the backup root
Drive creates a separate app-owned root

requirements: Wrong password or key, corruption, replay, unsafe paths, and future versions fail closed.
Provider storage and logs receive no plaintext records, originals, credentials, or keys.

evidence.contains: pairing import fails closed for wrong passwords, corruption, future versions, and unknown fields
fails closed on traversal and corrupted provider bytes
fails closed for a wrong password and authenticated-header or ciphertext tampering
rejects a duplicated message identity within one pairing

requirements: Albums, provenance, selection, active view, exact counts, and queue order survive transfer review.
Unavailable originals remain visibly metadata-only.

evidence.contains: without reordering the Queue
never fabricate favorites provenance
album-scoped transfer review and preserve the active source
without changing selection or view

requirements: Interop custody preserves the documented privacy and plaintext-at-rest boundaries.
Hardened release packages and their production identity checks remain executable.

evidence.contains: central release build policy minifies and removes development-only debugging
invariant: interoperability custody never reaches host-page, provider, log, or extension storage APIs
the package workflow validates that the packaged app can start
allows only the released extension and file references in bounded frames
